message: perf: optimize sweep planning and dashboard

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ on:
       batch_size:
         description: "Items per shard"
         required: false
-        default: "1"
+        default: "2"
       codex_timeout_ms:
         description: "Per-item Codex timeout in milliseconds"
         required: false
@@ -51,23 +51,66 @@ jobs:
       apply_closures: ${{ steps.mode.outputs.apply_closures }}
       batch_size: ${{ steps.mode.outputs.batch_size }}
       codex_timeout_ms: ${{ steps.mode.outputs.codex_timeout_ms }}
-      item_number: ${{ steps.mode.outputs.item_number }}
-      shard_count: ${{ steps.shards.outputs.shard_count }}
-      shards: ${{ steps.shards.outputs.shards }}
+      matrix: ${{ steps.select.outputs.matrix }}
+      planned_count: ${{ steps.select.outputs.planned_count }}
+      planned_shards: ${{ steps.select.outputs.planned_shards }}
     steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          path: clawsweeper
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "24"
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: clawsweeper/package-lock.json
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        working-directory: clawsweeper
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build ClawSweeper
+        working-directory: clawsweeper
+        run: npm run build
+
       - id: mode
         run: |
           {
             echo "apply_closures=${{ github.event.inputs.apply_closures || 'false' }}"
-            echo "batch_size=${{ github.event.inputs.batch_size || '1' }}"
+            echo "batch_size=${{ github.event.inputs.batch_size || '2' }}"
             echo "codex_timeout_ms=${{ github.event.inputs.codex_timeout_ms || '600000' }}"
-            echo "item_number=${{ github.event.inputs.item_number || '' }}"
           } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
-      - id: shards
+
+      - id: select
+        working-directory: clawsweeper
         env:
           SHARD_COUNT: ${{ github.event.inputs.shard_count || '10' }}
+          BATCH_SIZE: ${{ github.event.inputs.batch_size || '2' }}
+          ITEM_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.inputs.item_number || '' }}
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.OPENCLAW_GH_TOKEN || github.token }}
         run: |
-          node -e 'const n = Math.max(1, Number(process.env.SHARD_COUNT || 10)); console.log("shard_count=" + n); console.log("shards=" + JSON.stringify([...Array(n).keys()]));' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          set -euo pipefail
+          item_arg=()
+          if [ -n "$ITEM_NUMBER" ]; then
+            item_arg=(--item-number "$ITEM_NUMBER")
+          fi
+          npm run --silent plan -- \
+            --batch-size "$BATCH_SIZE" \
+            --max-pages 250 \
+            --shard-count "$SHARD_COUNT" \
+            --codex-model gpt-5.4 \
+            --codex-reasoning-effort high \
+            --codex-service-tier fast \
+            "${item_arg[@]}" > plan.json
+          node - <<'NODE' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          const fs = require("node:fs");
+          const plan = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("plan.json", "utf8"));
+          console.log(`matrix=${JSON.stringify(plan.matrix)}`);
+          console.log(`planned_count=${plan.candidates.length}`);
+          console.log(`planned_shards=${plan.matrix.length}`);
+          NODE
+          cat plan.json
 
   review:
     needs: plan

       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: clawsweeper

@@ -55,15 +58,15 @@ The normal workflow is proposal-only. It runs configurable parallel shards and n
 Each review job:
 
 1. Checks out this repo.
-2. Checks out a full `openclaw/openclaw` working tree.
-3. Selects the next open item by issue number, starting from `#1`.
+2. Uses a planner job that selects the next open items once, starting from `#1`, and hands explicit item-number batches to review shards.
+3. Checks out `openclaw/openclaw` at `main`, with cached git objects for faster startup.
 4. Runs Codex with `gpt-5.4`, high reasoning, fast service tier, and a 10-minute per-item timeout inside the OpenClaw checkout.
 5. Writes `items/<number>.md` with the decision, proposed close comment, and a GitHub snapshot hash.
 6. Marks high-confidence allowed close decisions as `proposed_close`.
 
-Codex runs without GitHub write tokens. The runner checks the OpenClaw checkout before and after every review and fails the item if Codex leaves any tracked or untracked change behind.
+Codex runs without GitHub write tokens. The runner checks the OpenClaw checkout before every review, makes the checkout read-only in CI, checks it again after review, and fails the item if Codex leaves any tracked or untracked change behind.
 
-Parallel workflow shards each own a different slice of the open-item list. The final job merges artifacts and updates this README so the dashboard reflects progress.
+Parallel workflow shards only receive planned item numbers. The final job merges artifacts and updates this README so the dashboard reflects progress.
 
 To close later without rerunning Codex, dispatch the workflow with `apply_existing=true`. That mode reads existing `items/*.md`, refetches the issue/PR context, recomputes the snapshot hash, and only comments/closes if nothing changed since the proposal was written.

+npm run plan -- --batch-size 2 --shard-count 10 --max-pages 250 --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast
+npm run review -- --openclaw-dir ../openclaw --batch-size 2 --max-pages 250 --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast --codex-timeout-ms 600000
 npm run apply-artifacts -- --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews
